name: svtplay-dl
description: Download videos from your favourite play services

name: --help
-h
options.description: Show help for svtplay-dl

options.name: --version
options.description: Show program's version number and exit

name: -o
--output
options.description: Outputs to the given filename or folder

options.name: --subfolder
options.description: Create a subfolder titled as the show, non-series gets in folder movies

options.name: --config
options.description: Specify configuration file

name: -f
--force
options.description: Overwrite if file exists already

name: -r
--resume
options.description: Resume a download (RTMP obsolete)

name: -l
--live
options.description: Enable for live streams (RTMP based ones)

name: -c
--capture_time
options.description: Define capture time in minutes of a live stream

name: -s
--silent
options.description: Be less verbose

options.name: --silent-semi
options.description: Only show a message when the file is downloaded

name: -u
--username
options.description: Username (if applicable)

name: -p
--password
options.description: Password (if applicable)

name: -t
--thumbnail
options.description: Download thumbnail from the site if available

name: -g
--get-url
options.description: Do not download any video, but instead print the URL

options.name: --get-only-episode-url
options.description: Do not get video URLs, only print the episode URL

options.name: --dont-verify-ssl-cert
options.description: Don't attempt to verify SSL certificates

options.name: --http-header
options.description: A header to add to each HTTP request

options.name: --cookies
options.description: A cookies to add to each HTTP request

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Exclude videos with the WORD(s) in the filename. Comma separated

options.name: --after-date
options.description: Only videos published on or after this date

options.name: --proxy
options.description: Use the specified HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS proxy. To enable experimental SOCKS proxy, specify a proper scheme. For example socks5://127.0.0.1:1080/

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Explain what is going on

options.name: --nfo
options.description: Create a NFO file

options.name: --force-nfo
options.description: Download only NFO if used with --nfo

options.name: --only-audio
options.description: Only download audio if audio and video is separated

options.name: --only-video
options.description: Only download video if audio and video is separated

name: -q
--quality
options.description: Choose what format to download based on bitrate/video resolution. It will download the best format by default

name: -Q
--flexible-quality
options.description: Allow given quality (as above) to differ by an amount

name: -P
--preferred
options.description: Preferred download method (dash, hls, or http)

options.name: --list-quality
options.description: List the quality for a video

options.name: --stream-priority
options.description: If two streams have the same quality, choose the one you prefer

options.name: --format-preferred
options.description: Choose the format you prefer, use --list-quality to show which one to choose from

options.name: --audio-language
options.description: Choose the language of the audio (it can override the default one), use --list-quality to show which one to choose from

options.name: --audio-role
options.description: Choose the role of the audio (it can override the default one), use --list-quality to show which one to choose from

name: -S
--subtitle
options.description: Download subtitle from the site if available

name: -M
--merge-subtitle
options.description: Merge subtitle with video/audio file with corresponding ISO639-3 language code. This invokes --remux automatically

options.name: --force-subtitle
options.description: Download only subtitle if its used with -S

options.name: --require-subtitle
options.description: Download only if a subtitle is available

options.name: --all-subtitles
options.description: Download all available subtitles for the video

options.name: --raw-subtitles
options.description: Also download the subtitles in their native format

options.name: --convert-subtitle-colors
options.description: Converts the color information in subtitles, to <font color=""> tags

name: -A
--all-episodes
options.description: Try to download all episodes

options.name: --all-last
options.description: Get last NN episodes instead of all episodes

options.name: --include-clips
options.description: Include clips from websites when using -A

options.name: --cmore-operatorlist
options.description: Show operatorlist for cmore

options.name: --no-remux
options.description: Do not automatically remux to mp4

options.name: --no-merge
options.description: Do not automatically merge video, audio and possibly also subtitle(s) together

options.name: --no-postprocess
options.description: Do not postprocess anything

options.name: --keep-original
options.description: Do postprocessing while also keeping original files

options.name: --output-format
options.description: Format you want resulting file in (mkv or mp4), mp4 is default
